message:
fix: resolve pre-existing compilation and clippy errors

- remote.rs: remove turbofish on spawn_remote (generic param removed)
- three_lane.rs: fix ThreeLaneWaker/ThreeLaneLocalWaker struct fields
- io_driver.rs: manual Debug impl for IoDriverHandle (dyn Reactor)
- replay.rs: seed % 2 == 0 -> seed.is_multiple_of(2)
- test files: add missing_docs allow, fix redundant clone/unused var

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
